events.message: Memory usage 6.1Gi exceeds request; pod has no memory limit set
Node node-7 condition MemoryPressure is now True (available 220Mi)
System OOM encountered on node-7, victim cgroup kubepods
Container auth killed, exceeded memory under node pressure
The node was low on resource: memory. Pod cart-5cc evicted.
Container image-resize killed under node-7 memory pressure
Readiness probe failed: connection refused (pod restarting after OOM)
Node node-7 MemoryPressure still True; kubelet evicting to reclaim

note: Every eviction/OOMKill is on node-7. auth, cart, and image-resize were all scheduled on node-7 and were killed because batch-importer (also on node-7, no memory limit) ate the node's memory. The services did not fail because they call each other — they failed because they are neighbors on a saturated node.
